steps.assistant_text: Held-base-pointer coloring crack of a documented '2nd-block regalloc renumber cap' (was 99.07% / 4 real-diff words). Two held-pointer levers: (1) scope the slot-counter's field pointer into its own block (`{ int *fld = (int*)a1[0xC/4]; counter = fld[1]; fld[1] = counter+1; }`) so IDO colors it into $v1 and the counter into $a0 (reproducing the target's reuse of the dead first param $a0 for counter); (2) compute the destination as a HELD element pointer `base = &((int*)((int*)a1[0xC/4])[0])[counter*2]` so IDO emits the target's load-base-then-addu tail (lw t2; addu a1,t2,t3; sw...a1) instead of base-into-a1/addu-into-v1. Appends a 2-word F3DEX2 G_DL command (0x06000000 marker + call return) into a per-handle ring buffer. gl_func_00000000 = canonical USO runtime-resolved placeholder callee (ROM has raw 0x0C000000).

metadata.verification: byte-exact (.text word-diff = 0 vs expected/.o); full make ROM byte-identical to baserom (ROM OK).
